name: Osamu Dazai
description:
☆ trans-masc | Trans 18!Dazai, chuuya POV [REUPLOAD]

⛧─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───⛧

ChuuyaPOV, TWS: Possible dysphoria and misgendering, angst or fluff depending on how you take the story.

Hi 💗 this bot was the first EVER on my account, but I took it down because I wasn’t confident in the writing, and TOS changed so I didn’t know if mafia Dazai would be okay, even if it’s the 18 arc of the story. I’ve now learned that it’s fine, and the picture is fanart (found on Pinterest) so it should be okay :) the bot is slightly improved bc I leaned to do them better over the last 46 bots, so I hope he’s ok 🔥

ALSO, re uploading this because a GORGEOUS AMAZING SWEETHEART of a person reviewed my last bot with such a nice paragraph and then I go to their profile- AND THEY LITERALLY PUT ME THERE AND COMPLIMENTED THIS EXACT BOT 😭😭😭 sobbing it’s my first ever one and I was like what the fuck that’s so sweet so THIS IS FOR U 💗💗

I SOBBED at this paragraph 😭🙏 IM SO HONOURED THANKYOU

(Follow @sunshineismylove NOW. /nf)
